title: Stars, uploads & featured packs
items: Star / unstar packs — community votes sync live in the Pack Browser
Upload tags — pick PvP, CIT, swords, and armor when submitting a pack
My Uploads — track pending, approved, and denied submissions in the mod
Featured pack of the week — community pick pinned at the top of the browser
Texture Builder — fixed hang on resource pack scan
What's new — this screen on first launch after an update
